notes: First-person subject clitic N and preverbal negator ka per baptista2002; ALUPEC spelling per veiga2002.
Imperfective particle ta per baptista2002; phonemic nasal vowel written vowel+n, pon [põ], per veiga2002.
Affricate tx [tʃ] and palatal ⟨nh⟩ [ɲ], nasal manhan [maɲã], per veiga2002.
Velarised coda /l/ [ɫ] in el and affricate tx [tʃ] per veiga2002; kretxeu 'beloved' per lang2013.
Coda /s/ raised to [ʃ] in es per veiga2002; the ⟨ãu⟩ diphthong keeps the tilde, nãu [nãu], per veiga2002.
Affricate dj [dʒ] per veiga2002; imperfective ta per baptista2002; djunta 'gather' per lang2013.
Word-initial strong rhotic ⟨r⟩ [ʀ] versus intervocalic tap [ɾ] in largu per veiga2002.
Palatal possessive nha [ɲa] per veiga2002; intervocalic tap [ɾ] in tera per veiga2002.
Coda sibilant voiced to [ʒ] before the following voiced onset, oras dja, per veiga2002; completive dja per baptista2002.
Second-person plural nhos [ɲoʃ] with palatal onset and coda [ʃ] per veiga2002; negator ka per baptista2002.
Coda /s/ before a stop realised [ʃ], sta [ʃta], and nasal vowel duenti [duẽti], per veiga2002.

sentence: N misti un kopu di agu.
ipa: ˈn ˈmiʃti ˈũ ˈkopu ˈdi ˈaɡu
gloss_en: I want a cup of water.
notes: Coda [ʃ] in misti and nasal un [ũ] per veiga2002; misti 'want' per lang2013.
Velarised coda [ɫ] in kel and affricate dj [dʒ] in mudjer per veiga2002.
Third-person plural es [eʃ] with coda [ʃ] per veiga2002; imperfective ta per baptista2002.

gloss_en: My father is not coming today.
notes: Nasal vowel bem [bẽ] and ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] in oxi per veiga2002; negator ka per baptista2002.
Velarised coda [ɫ] in kel per veiga2002; invariant adjective nobu with no gender agreement per baptista2002.

sentence: N ta fla bu un koza.
ipa: ˈn ˈta ˈfla ˈbu ˈũ ˈkoza
notes: Nasal un [ũ] per veiga2002; imperfective ta and clitic pronouns N/bu per baptista2002.

sentence: Fidju di algen ka ta fika.
ipa: ˈfidʒu ˈdi ˈaɫɡẽ ˈka ˈta ˈfika
notes: Affricate dj [dʒ] in fidju and velarised [ɫ] plus nasal in algen [aɫɡẽ] per veiga2002.
Open-mid [ɔ] and velarised coda [ɫ] in sol per veiga2002; completive dja per baptista2002.
Intervocalic tap [ɾ] in kriolu per veiga2002; imperfective ta and subject nu per baptista2002.
